---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enforcement control, provider, or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**
What agent-spend / quota / operability problem does this solve? Concrete failure
mode preferred (e.g. "a runaway that grows its context evades loop detection").

**Proposed control / change**
What you'd like heave to do. If it's an enforcement control, note the scope
(per-key / per-run / per-provider) and whether it needs to be pre-vendor and/or
cross-replica.

**Alternatives / prior art**
How you handle this today, or how another gateway does it.

**Honesty check**
What would this *not* cover? (We value knowing the limits up front.)
